message:
refactor(tests): improve e2e_middleware error handling idioms

Replace match-based error extraction patterns with more idiomatic
if-let-err + assert + let-else patterns throughout e2e_middleware.rs:

- Use if-let to log errors before asserting, avoiding unreachable
  code paths after panic!()
- Replace nested if-let with assert! + let-else for cleaner control flow
- Simplifies error message rewrite assertion in on_error test

63 insertions / 66 deletions — pure refactor, no behavioral change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
